mapper.sql: select asset_id, resource_id, asset_type, asset_name, file_url, cover_url, content_text, summary, biz_type, biz_id, sort_no, allow_download, view_count, download_count, favorite_count, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_resource_asset
mapper.insert: insert into sc_resource_asset(resource_id, asset_type, asset_name, file_url, cover_url, content_text, summary, biz_type, biz_id, sort_no, allow_download, view_count, download_count, favorite_count, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{resourceId}, #{assetType}, #{assetName}, #{fileUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{contentText}, #{summary}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{sortNo}, #{allowDownload}, #{viewCount}, #{downloadCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from sc_resource_asset where asset_id in
#{assetId}
